title: OXO Good Grips Deep Clean Brush Set - Orange
features: Set includes: Large Brush and Small Brush with Wiper Blade
Large Brush is great for tile grout, shower-door tracks, stove tops and more
Small Brush is perfect for fixtures and other tight spaces
Small Brush’s Wiper Blade cleans built up dirt from drains and other crevices

The OXO Better Guarantee: If you experience an issue with your OXO product, get in touch with us for a repair or replacement. We’re grateful for the opportunity to learn from your experience, and we’ll make it better.
description: From the manufacturer OXO Good Grips Deep Clean Brush Set A powerful pair for scrubbing stubborn grime. Grime-fighting duo The OXO Good Grips Deep Clean Brush Set features two brushes for easily scrubbing all the hard-to-clean places where dirt builds up. Both Brushes feature sturdy nylon bristles and soft, comfortable non-slip grips. The Deep Clean Brush Set is also great for nooks and crannies in the kitchen – try it out on stove tops, kitchen sink drains, microwaves and more. Large brush The Large Brush is sized and angled perfectly for scrubbing grout, shower door tracks and more. Thumb pad The soft, non-slip thumb pad on the back of the bristle head allows for optimal comfort when applying maximum scrubbing force. Small brush The Small Brush, with its compact bristle head and pointed bristle profile, is great for cleaning in and around fixtures, thin grout lines and other tight spaces. Wiper blade Finally the built-in wiper blade that removes built up dirt from drains and other crevices.
